title: SecureFusion Event Manifest (SF1)
description: Canonical event manifest for a single vehicle-media event. The bundleHash anchored on chain is SHA-256 over the canonical UTF-8 byte representation of this document. Implementers MUST be able to produce a valid manifest from spec/manifest-format.md §6 alone.

channels.description: One entry per video channel. Channels MUST be sorted by channelId using ordinal (Unicode codepoint) comparison; see SPEC §6.1.

eventId.description: Lowercase hyphenated UUID for the event. In v1 emissions this equals vehicleEventId; the field is preserved for forward-compatibility with future v2+ where they may diverge.

ingestSource.description: Producing platform identifier. SecureFusion v1 defines a single value, "fleetfusion"; v2 may extend this enum. Per-upstream-provider distinctions are not exposed on the public wire format.

ingestedAt.description: Time the ingest gateway first hashed the event. UTC, exactly 3 fractional-second digits, suffix Z.

occurredAt.description: Capture time. UTC, exactly 3 fractional-second digits, suffix Z.

sealedAt.description: Time the manifest was canonicalised and the bundleHash computed. UTC, exactly 3 fractional-second digits, suffix Z.

signerKeyId.description: Optional. Identifies which application signing key was active when this manifest was sealed. Per §6.1.7 omit-when-empty: producers MUST omit this field when empty/null and MUST NOT emit "" or null. Verifiers MUST reject manifests in which signerKeyId is present-but-empty.

tenantId.description: Optional pseudonymous tenant identifier. Per §6.1.7 omit-when-empty: producers MUST omit this field when empty/zero (e.g. Guid.Empty) and MUST NOT emit "" or null.

v.description: Manifest schema version. v1 verifiers MUST reject any value other than 1 with reason code unsupported-manifest-version (SPEC §1.5).

vehicleEventId.description: Lowercase hyphenated UUID identifying the originating vehicle event in the producing platform's domain model. Always present; in v1 equals eventId.

vehicleId.description: Tenant-chosen vehicle identifier. Producers SHOULD use a stable opaque identifier (e.g. UUID or fleet asset code).

capturedAt.description: Optional. Channel-specific capture start time. Same timestamp shape as the top-level fields.

channelId.description: Unique identifier for the channel within the event. Lowercase alphanumeric with `_`/`-`.

durationMs.description: Optional. Duration in milliseconds. Integer only; floats are forbidden in v1.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the raw channel video file as received.

sizeBytes.description: File size in bytes. Integer only; floats are forbidden in v1.
